item.title: Mohsen Mahdawi released on bail after being detained for two weeks.
item.description: "Mohsen Mahdawi, a 34-year-old U.S. permanent resident who was raised in a refugee camp in the West Bank, was detained during his April 14 naturalization interview in Vermont." They literally arrested him while he was in the middle of "doing it legally", just to drive home the point that this isn't about "illegal aliens", but about trying to show they can ignore the court system and the law both in spirit AND the letter. Source: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/judge-orders-columbia-student-mohsen-mahdawi-released-rcna203675
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: Daily dose of sacrilege DUMP
item.dc:creator: Bobpeechisreturns

item.title: I'm at a loss
item.description: I had a lung biopsy yesterday and i was scared my lung might collapse (it happens, but rarely so) and that i would be awake during the procedure. It went off without a hitch. Unfortunately, it turns out the pet scan was wrong, it was cancer. This means my stage 3 diagnosis has been upgraded to stage 4! Yay upgrades! The good news is they have a plan. Aggressive chemo. I think. I'm waiting on a call from my primary oncologist to confirm, but thats what she said would be the plan. I was diagnosed with stage 3 colon cancer last year. It was so bad they had to operate immediately. Went from 1st routine colonoscopy to cancer removal in 8 days. Then 6 months of radiation and chemo. Now this. I'm just yelling into the void here so if you got this far, thank you for listening. I hope you have a peaceful day. Update: im starting Folfiri treatment in a couple of weeks. Fingers crossed.
item.dc:creator: SkamanSam

item.title: Okay but this actually looks so good lol
item.dc:creator: OffirProf

item.title: A local millionaire responsible for a 2nd death is avoiding charges.
item.description:
Jeff Knight is the owner of the boat that hit the ferry. He's a bigwig millionaire that owns Janus Live(A music venue where I live) in St Petersburg Florida. He has 3 previous DUI's and was given probation in 2012 when a passenger on his boat fell overboard and died. On Tuesday he was driving his boat and hit a ferry killing one and injuring 10 people. He then left the scene of the accident. So far the city is refusing to arrest him or file any charges. Locals are already starting to boycott the venue over this, I really hope something comes of it and this guy doesn't get to keep ruining lives.
This is the man who lost his life to Jeff Knights gross negligence.
The police are saying he took a breathalyzer later and blew 0.0 but that's BS this guy is well known for being a coke head and alcoholic and getting away with things constantly by local police. It's insane how much pull this guy has because he owns local businesses and a music venue in the city.
Venue: https://maps.app.goo.gl/NheriNka2EcezTJh8 Full story: https://baynews9.com/fl/tampa/news/2025/04/29/ferry-crash-investigation-congoing--no-charges-filed-as-of-yet?cid=id-app15_m-share_s-web_cmp-app_launch_august2020_c-producer_posts_po-organic&sfnsn=mo
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: House Judiciary Committee just voted to allow for deportations of U.S. citizen, per Jasmine Crockett and Eric Swalwell
item.description: reddit post where I saw it.. https://www.reddit.com/r/law/comments/1kbvfg0/house_judiciary_committee_just_voted_to_allow_for/ Jasmine Crockett's insta if you'd rather skip reddit and go right to the source.. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DJFfYzFvD8g/ I got nothing to say. You can draw your own conclusions from this.
item.dc:creator: sadurdaynight

item.title: Good News-letter #4 - April edition!
item.description:
Hello guys, gals, and non-binary pals! Here’s a fresh batch of good news for you to digest!
Japan uses money tied up in Western assets to back a loan for Ukraine - https://thesarkariform.com/japan-just-gave-ukraine-3-billion-from-russian-assets/
Unauthorized mob of men who forcibly removed woman from a town hall receive laundry list of charges - https://www.ktvb.com/article/news/local/idaho/six-charged-coeur-dalene-town-hall-incident/277-204bf517-c188-401f-a904-7859511da073
Pentagon to resume gender-affirming care for service members - https://www.ktvb.com/article/news/local/idaho/six-charged-coeur-dalene-town-hall-incident/277-204bf517-c188-401f-a904-7859511da073
Paris has cut its air pollution by half - https://www.reddit.com/r/goodnews/s/WAgtKI8RAC
Planet exceeds 40% clean power threshold - https://electrek.co/2025/04/07/world-surges-past-40-percent-clean-power-in-record-renewable-boom/
Iconic “gayborhood” builds affordable housing for elderly members of LGBTQIA+ community - https://www.goodgoodgood.co/articles/oak-lawn-place-affordable-housing-lgbtq-texas
That’s all for now my friends! If this helped you today, consider sharing with others. I love you and there’s nothing you can do about it! See you at the end of May! Want to be notified on the next one? Comment “Count me in!” Missed last month? Here ya go - https://imgur.com/gallery/7GOl33U
item.dc:creator: rabbihimself

item.title: Don’t really know what to do with myself
item.description: He followed me into my office’s otherwise empty parking lot. Banged on the windows, tried the door handles, pressed his face against the window next to me. I called 911 while it was happening, and it took the cops an hour to follow up. Idk if I should stay at work or go home or wtf I’m supposed to be doing after something like that. Edit: Thanks so much for all of the kind comments and advice! To answer a few questions, I’d seen the guy walking in the main street before I turned off onto the little lane that leads to the back lot of the small law firm I work for. Because of the building, you can’t see into the lane, and I didn’t see him coming until I was parked. As for why I didn’t immediately drive off- one, I didn’t want to hurt the guy (this seemed like a mental break of some sort, and I didn’t want to add to his problems), second, dispatch made it seem like the police were almost there, and third, because I was terrified and went a little brain dead. I did eventually snap out of it and started to reverse, and that’s when he gave up. I really do appreciate all of the thoughts and suggestions. I’m home now and chilling with my two big dogs. Best protection and therapy I could ask for:). -Oh and also, no the police did not show up- they called about an hour later to ask me a question because they had found him. We do have security cameras, and the officer later requested the video, so it is all documented.
item.dc:creator: mehismyname

item.title: Belle before Beauty and the Beast – Emmanuelle Beart
item.description:
French actress Emmanuelle Béart (Manon des Sources, Mission: Impossible) looks like Belle in 1986, six years before the Disney adaptation of La Belle et la Bête
Photos by Jacques Lange backstage at Théâtre Édouard VII in Paris, where Béart portrayed miss Lucile in the theater production of La Répétition ou l'amour puni
item.dc:creator: Ngugi
